title: Radhai Manathil Lyrics Snegithiye
stanzas: <div>Raadhai Manathil Lyrics Snegithiye

Raadhai manathil
raadhai manthil
enna ragasiyamo
kan rendum thandhi adikkika
kannaa vaa kandu pidikka(2)

kollai nilavadikkum
vellai raathiriyil
kothai raadhai nadanthaal

moongil kaattil
oru gaanam kasinthavudam
moochu vaangi uraindhaal.

paadal vandha vazhi
aadai paranthathaiyum
paavai marandhu tholaithaal.

nenjai moodikolla
aadai thaevai endru
nilavin oliyai iluththaal.

nenjin oasai odunjivittaal
nizhalai kandu nadungi vittaal
kannan thaedi vandha magal
thanni tholaithu mayangivittaal

thaan irukkindra idaththinil
irudhayam kaanavillai
engae engae sol sol.

kan rendum thandhi adikkika
kannaa vaa kandu pidikka

Raadhai manathil
raadhai manthil
enna ragasiyamo
kan rendum thandhi adikkika
kannaa vaa kandu pidikka

kannan oodhum kuzhal
kaatril thoongivittu
kaantham pola ilukkum.

mangai vandhavudan
maraindhu kolluvadhu
maaya kannan vazhakkam

kaadu irunduvida
kangal sivandhuvida
kathal radhai alaindhaal

avanai thaedi aval
thannai tholaithu vittu
aasai noyil vilundhaal

udhadu thudikkum paechu illai
uyirum irukkum moochu illai
vandha paathai ninaivu illai
pogum paathai puriyavillai

un puzhaanguzhal saththam
paedhai radhai jeevan kolval
kannaa ingae nee vaa vaa

kanneeril uyir thudikka
kannaa vaa uyir kodukka.

Raadhai manathil
raadhai manthil
enna ragasiyamo
kan rendum thandhi adikkika
kannaa vaa kandu pidikka

kannam theendiyadhu
kannan endru andha
kanni kangal vizhithaal

kannam theendiyadhu
kannan alla verum
kaatru endru thigaithaal.

kangal moodi kondu
kannan paerai solli
kaigal neetti azhaithaal.

kaattill tholaithuvitta
kannin neer thuliyai
ingu kandu pidithaal

kiliyin siragai vaangikondu
kizhakku nokki siragadithaal
kuyilin kuralai vaangi kondu
koovi koovi aval azhaithaal

aval kurai uyir karaiyumun
udal mannil sariyumun
kannaa kannaa nee vaa

kanneeril uyir thudikka
kannaa vaa uyir kodukka.

seo.title: Radhai Manathil Lyrics Snegithiye

seo.keywords: Snegithiye, Vidyasagar, K.S.Chitra, Sujatha Mohan, Radhai Manathil full lyrics, Snegithiye songs lyrics, Radhai Manathil lyrics snippets, Radhai Manathil WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Radhai Manathil lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, capturing the essence of longing and connection.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Snegithiye, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationship.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of K.S.Chitra and Sujatha Mohan, both renowned for their melodious singing.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Radhai Manathil was composed by Vidyasagar, known for his captivating melodies in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 24, 2000, as part of the movie Snegithiye.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Radhai Manathil, the enchanting duet unfolds a tale of love and longing, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of the characters in Snegithiye. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of romance, making it a favorite for couples. The song conveys the beauty of connection and the magic of shared moments, evoking feelings of nostalgia and warmth. With the exceptional vocal performances by K.S.Chitra and Sujatha Mohan, this track remains a timeless classic in Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Radhai Manathil from the movie Snegithiye is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of K.S.Chitra and Sujatha Mohan, this song is a perfect blend of soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the magic of Vidyasagar's composition that makes this track a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: In my heart, what secret does Radha hold? Come, my eyes, and see it.
On a bright night when the moon shines, if Radha walks, it will be enchanting.
In the bamboo grove, if a song is sung, it will spread like a fragrance.
If the song comes through the path, it will make the girl forget her worries.
To calm the heart, if the moonlight is written down, it will be needed.
If the heart's voice is lost and the shadow is seen, if the girl who sought Krishna loses her water, she will be confused.
In the place where I am, the heart cannot be seen; where is it, tell me.
Come, my eyes, and see what secret Radha holds.
In my heart, what secret does Radha hold? Come, my eyes, and see it.
When Krishna plays his flute, it will be like a beautiful dream.
When a girl comes, it is like a magical act of Krishna.
If love arises from the forest, it will bloom in the eyes.
If she seeks him, she will lose herself and fall into the pain of desire.
There is no sound of life in the path that has come; there is no memory of the path that has gone.
Your flute's sound is calling Radha; come here, come here.
In tears, life awakens; come, give life.
In my heart, what secret does Radha hold? Come, my eyes, and see it.
When the eyes are closed, they see Krishna.
When the eyes are closed, they see only the wind.
With closed eyes, if they call Krishna, they will stretch their hands and call him.
If the tears are lost, the water will be found here.
With the bird's wings, looking east, if the cuckoo's voice is heard, she will cry.
Her flaws are like life; in this body, everything is right.
In tears, life awakens; come, give life.
